prompt: Edit image 1: Apply the distinctive geometric striped pattern found in image 2 to fill the areas of the butterfly's wings and the lavender plants. Create a stylized artwork with this unique geometric pattern.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1: Apply the black and white angular striped pattern from image 2 to fill the interior regions of the butterfly's wings and the leaves and flower clusters of the lavender plants. The resulting image should be a stylized artwork, retaining the original outlines of the butterfly and lavender while incorporating the geometric pattern.
objects: Black and white angular striped pattern
Butterfly wings with black and white angular striped pattern
Lavender leaves with black and white angular striped pattern
Lavender flower clusters with black and white angular striped pattern
